assembly_context.name: Battery_Pack_2P4S_Assembly
assembly_context.summary: 基于18650电芯(2并4串)的电池包装配体，包含下壳体、上壳体、独立电池支架及8节电芯模型。

global_coordinate_system.origin: Bottom_Case geometric center at bottom face

design_rules: All external sharp edges must have R2 fillets.
Wall thickness for plastic parts is 2.5mm.
Units are in mm, convert to meters for modeling code.
M3 screws are simplified as cylinders for assembly constraints.

instances.name: Top Case Instance
instances.placement_notes: Placed on top of Bottom Case.

assembly_sequence: Insert inst_cell_1 to inst_cell_8 into inst_cell_holder

part.name: Top Case
part.function: Cover for the battery pack, securing cells and providing wire exit.
part.shape: Rectangular plate with raised rim to fit into bottom case, central cutout for wires, and 4 through-holes for M3 screws.

faces.name: face_bottom_mating
faces.purpose: Mates with Bottom Case top inner face

axes.name: axis_screw_hole_1
axes.purpose: Concentric with Bottom Case screw post 1

axes.name: axis_screw_hole_2
axes.purpose: Concentric with Bottom Case screw post 2

axes.name: axis_screw_hole_3
axes.purpose: Concentric with Bottom Case screw post 3

axes.name: axis_screw_hole_4
axes.purpose: Concentric with Bottom Case screw post 4

assembly_relation_notes: Mates with Bottom Case via face coincidence and screw axis concentricity.
standalone_modeling_instructions: Create base sketch on XY plane, rectangle 140x75.
Shell inward by 2.5mm, keeping top face.
Cut a 20x10mm rectangular window on the top face, centered.
Drill 4 through-holes (3.2mm) corresponding to screw post positions.
Apply R2 fillet to all external vertical edges.
